ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stock_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock price entry */,
  "stock_symbol" TEXT /* Stock symbol (e.g., AAPL, GOOG, MSFT) */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the stock price */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time of the stock price update */,
  "open" TEXT /* Opening price of the stock on the given date */,
  "high" TEXT /* Highest price of the stock on the given date */,
  "low" TEXT /* Lowest price of the stock on the given date */,
  "close" TEXT /* Closing price of the stock on the given date */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Trading volume of the stock on the given date */,
  "adjusted_close" TEXT /* Adjusted closing price, accounting for corporate actions */,
  "dividend_amount" TEXT /* Dividend amount paid on the given date */,
  "split_ratio" TEXT /* Split ratio if a stock split occurred on the given date */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the stock exchange */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., API, manual entry) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_prices_exchange_id FOREIGN KEY ("exchange_id") REFERENCES exchanges ("exchange_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_prices_stock_symbol FOREIGN KEY ("stock_symbol") REFERENCES stock_symbols ("stock_symbol")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_symbols" (
  "symbol_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock symbol */,
  "stock_symbol" TEXT /* Stock symbol (e.g., AAPL, GOOG, MSFT) */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* Stock exchange where the company is listed (e.g., NYSE, NASDAQ) */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector of the company (e.g., Technology, Healthcare, Finance) */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of the company (e.g., Software, Pharmaceuticals) */,
  "market_cap" TEXT /* Market capitalization of the company */,
  "ipo_date" TEXT /* Date the company went public */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date the information was updated */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("symbol_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., investor, analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* User's password */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user's account (e.g., active, suspended, pending) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* List of permissions associated with the user's role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exchanges" (
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock exchange */,
  "exchange_name" TEXT /* Name of the stock exchange (e.g., NYSE, NASDAQ) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the stock exchange */,
  "established" TEXT /* Date the stock exchange was established */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the stock exchange */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the stock exchange */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the user who received the alert */,
  "stock_symbol" TEXT /* Stock symbol (e.g., AAPL, GOOG, MSFT) */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., stock split, merger, earnings announcement) */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date of the event */,
  "event_time" TEXT /* Time of the event */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., triggered, read, dismissed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "stock_symbol" TEXT /* Stock symbol (e.g., AAPL, GOOG, MSFT) */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the prediction */,
  "predicted_open" TEXT /* Predicted opening price of the stock */,
  "predicted_high" TEXT /* Predicted highest price of the stock */,
  "predicted_low" TEXT /* Predicted lowest price of the stock */,
  "predicted_close" TEXT /* Predicted closing price of the stock */,
  "predicted_volume" INTEGER /* Predicted trading volume of the stock */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the machine learning model used */,
  "confidence_score" TEXT /* Confidence score of the prediction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_stock_symbol FOREIGN KEY ("stock_symbol") REFERENCES stock_symbols ("stock_symbol")
)
